steps.title: Graph the two savings models
steps.content: This is an intersection question. Barbara starts with $70$ dollars and adds $10$ dollars per week, so graph $y=70+10x$. Maria starts with $120$ dollars and adds $5$ dollars per week, so graph $y=120+5x$.

steps.title: Read the intersection
steps.content: The two lines intersect where the savings amounts are equal. Desmos shows the intersection at $(10,170)$, so the savings are the same after $10$ weeks.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: A quick arithmetic check gives $70+10(10)=170$ and $120+5(10)=170$. Both values match, so the answer is choice C, 10.
